2026-03-13

My pull request was accepted to Astro Docs! Baby’s first PR! Next time I contribute, I’ll want to glance through the style guides first, since they had to change my wording.

I’m also not sure what happened to the description when I submitted my PR. Github did something strange and published the description blank. The template had a lot of comment markup to explain things; maybe I missed some and accidentally left my description in a section that got commented out? Hmm.
